surface: M4 local usage read model foundation
noTouch: public operator HTTP endpoint without auth

checks.browser: skip: pure local usage read model and existing smoke path only; no dashboard UI in scope

downshiftProof: route-local because the slice adds a pure in-memory read model fed by already-sanitized local gateway events plus deterministic tests/docs/smoke assertions; it uses no real IOTA network, Docker, durable storage, sponsor keys, dashboard endpoint, or secrets
knownFailures: Initial usage test failed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND before apps/policy-gateway-service/src/usage.ts existed; expected TDD red state.
notes: Adds a deterministic local usage read model that aggregates sanitized GatewayEvent objects by operation, outcome, reason code, app ID, and wallet address; bounds recent events; copies only allowlisted event fields; and is asserted in local smoke without introducing durable storage or an unauthenticated operator endpoint.
